description_long: This object consists of two tall, slender coconut palm trees with gracefully arching trunks that curve outward from a shared base. Each tree is topped with a dense crown of long, feathery, bright green fronds that radiate outward, creating a lush canopy. The trunks are textured with a rough, brown bark that tapers as it rises, and the fronds display a natural variation in green hues, with some leaves overlapping and others splaying outward. The base of the trees is slightly bulbous, suggesting a strong anchoring in the ground. No coconuts are visibly hanging from the fronds, and the overall appearance is healthy and vibrant. The asset is isolated on a white background, with no visible environmental context.
description: A pair of tall, arching coconut palm trees with lush green fronds and textured brown trunks, joined at the base. The trees are vibrant and healthy, with no visible coconuts.
description_view_0: Two palm trees arch outward from a shared base, with both crowns of fronds clearly visible and overlapping slightly.
description_view_1: One palm tree is mostly obscured behind the other, with the dense fronds of the front tree dominating the view.
description_view_2: Both palm trees are visible, arching away from each other, with their fronds spreading in opposite directions.
description_view_3: The trunks are closely aligned, and the fronds of both trees overlap, creating a dense canopy effect.
attribute_husk_pattern: No coconut husks are visible; only the rough, vertically striated bark of the palm trunks and the fine, linear texture of the palm fronds are apparent.
attribute_proximity_to_palm_trees: The object itself is composed of two palm trees growing together from a shared base, with no coconuts visible.
